sourceTitle: How tech teams can use Notion AI to boost productivity

questions.question: Which Notion AI feature helps team members find information without contacting colleagues?

options.text: AI Autofill
options.explanation: AI Autofill creates summaries, not searches.

options.text: Q&A search
options.explanation: Q&A search retrieves information across the workspace, reducing the need to disturb coworkers.

options.text: Content Expansion
options.explanation: Content Expansion generates text, it doesn't locate existing information.

options.text: Template Gallery
options.explanation: The Template Gallery provides pre‑made pages, not a search capability.

questions.question: How can AI Autofill be most beneficial for analyzing customer interview data?

options.text: It automatically tags each interview with sentiment analysis.
options.explanation: Tagging sentiment isn't a described function of Autofill.

options.text: It summarizes large interview transcripts into concise key points.
options.explanation: Autofill creates summaries, making it easier to extract key insights from extensive text.

options.text: It converts audio recordings into searchable text.
options.explanation: Audio transcription is not mentioned as an Autofill capability.

options.text: It generates follow‑up interview questions automatically.
options.explanation: Generating new questions is a content creation feature, not summarization.

questions.question: When using Notion AI for content creation, which of the following actions can it perform?

options.text: Expand on a brief prompt to produce longer text.
options.explanation: AI can take a short prompt and generate expanded content.

options.text: Encrypt the document for extra security.
options.explanation: Encryption is not a content‑creation feature of Notion AI.

options.text: Automatically publish the page to the web.
options.explanation: Publishing is a separate workflow, not an AI function.

options.text: Create a new database schema from scratch.
options.explanation: Database schema creation is not listed under content creation.

questions.question: Which statement best describes the advantage of Notion AI’s Q&A feature over traditional document search?

options.text: It returns only the most recent documents, ignoring older files.
options.explanation: Q&A does not filter by recency only.

options.text: It can understand natural language questions and provide concise answers.
options.explanation: Q&A interprets natural language and delivers direct answers, unlike keyword‑based search.

options.text: It replaces the need for any human reviewers in the workflow.
options.explanation: AI assists but does not fully replace human judgment.

options.text: It only works on public pages, not private workspace content.
options.explanation: Q&A works across the entire workspace, including private pages.

questions.question: A tech team wants to quickly generate a project roadmap draft. Which Notion AI capability should they use first?

options.text: AI Autofill to summarize existing roadmap documents.
options.explanation: Summarizing existing documents helps review, but doesn’t create a new draft.

options.text: Content Expansion to elaborate on a brief outline prompt.
options.explanation: Content Expansion can take a short outline and generate a fuller roadmap draft.

options.text: Q&A search to locate all past roadmaps for reference.
options.explanation: While useful for research, it doesn’t produce the draft itself.

options.text: Template Gallery to import a pre‑made roadmap template.
options.explanation: Templates provide structure but the question asks for an AI capability to generate content.

questions.question: What is a potential risk of relying solely on Notion AI’s summarization for critical decision‑making?

options.text: Summaries may omit nuanced details that affect decisions.
options.explanation: AI summaries condense information and can leave out subtleties needed for high‑stakes choices.

options.text: The AI will delete the original source documents.
options.explanation: AI does not delete content; it only creates summaries.

options.text: Summarization increases the file size of the database.
options.explanation: Summaries actually reduce content size.

options.text: AI summarization automatically shares the summary with external stakeholders.
options.explanation: Sharing is a separate action, not an automatic part of summarization.

questions.question: Which resource does the article suggest if a user wants to explore more Notion AI use cases beyond the guide?

options.text: The Notion AI certification program.
options.explanation: The article does not mention a certification program.

options.text: The help center and YouTube channel.
options.explanation: The guide lists the help center and a YouTube subscription as further resources.

options.text: The community forum for third‑party plugins.
options.explanation: Forums are not referenced in the article.

options.text: Downloading the Notion AI desktop app.
options.explanation: There is no separate desktop app mentioned.

questions.question: If a tech team member encounters a blocked video while following the guide, what is the recommended solution?

options.text: Disable the ad blocker or watch the video on YouTube.
options.explanation: The guide explicitly advises disabling the ad blocker or using the YouTube link.

options.text: Contact Notion support to request the video be unblocked.
options.explanation: The guide does not suggest contacting support for this issue.

options.text: Refresh the page repeatedly until the video loads.
options.explanation: Reloading won't bypass an ad blocker.

options.text: Switch to a different browser that doesn't support ads.
options.explanation: Changing browsers doesn't guarantee the ad blocker is removed.
